gt: 原式={\frac{1} {2}} \int_{0}^{\frac{1} {2}} {\frac{1} {2 t^{2}-2 t-4}} \ \mathrm{d} t={\frac{1} {1 2}} \int_{0}^{\frac{1} {2}} \left( {\frac{1} {t-2}}-{\frac{1} {t+1}} \right) \mathrm{d} t=-{\frac{\operatorname{l n} 2} {1 2}}

6 x-6 y-1 2 x y^{\prime}-3 x^{2} y^{\prime\prime}-6 y \left( y^{\prime} \right)^{2}-3 y^{2} y^{\prime\prime}+2-y^{\prime\prime}=0.

pred: \[    \text{原式} = 2 \iint_{D_1} \sin x^2 dx dy = 2 \int_{0}^{\sqrt{\pi}} dx \int_{0}^{x} \sin x^2 dy = 2 \int_{0}^{\sqrt{\pi}} x \sin x^2 dx = 2    \]
